name: aura-site
description: AURA marketing site and Netlify Functions API.

scripts.check: node --check netlify/functions/analyzeAura.js && node --check netlify/lib/auraCore.js && node --check site/script.js && node --check appstore/scripts/generate-assets.mjs
scripts.appstore:assets: npx playwright install chromium && node appstore/scripts/generate-assets.mjs
